Top framework anchors: ddat=0.435, dcwf=0.412, eu_ai_act=0.394. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within senior-level analytics and business intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4355 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DA-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Senior Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4355, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
